items.title: Bucs owner Joel Glazer will gladly write a big check for Baker Mayfield's next contract
items.summary: Buccaneers owner Joel Glazer will gladly pay what it takes to keep quarterback Baker Mayfield in Tampa Bay beyond the 2026 season.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Colchester confirm 'detailed' sale talks amid Terry link
items.summary: Colchester United confirm 'detailed' takeover talks are ongoing with an unnamed consortium amid reports that John Terry is involved.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
